meta.description: Synchronize narration, music, and SFX audio tracks with precise timing and level management

step.name: load_ssd_audio_config
step.action: Load the SSD audio configuration including narration segments with start/end timestamps, music track references with volume levels, SFX entries with trigger timestamps, and global audio settings (sample rate, bit depth, target loudness). Verify all referenced audio files exist on disk.
step.output: Validated audio configuration with confirmed file paths

step.name: map_narration_to_frames
step.action: Convert narration timestamps from the SSD into frame numbers based on the project FPS. Create Audio components for each narration segment, setting startFrom and endAt frame values. Verify narration segments do not overlap with each other. Ensure narration aligns with the corresponding scene boundaries.
step.output: Narration Audio components mapped to frame-accurate positions

step.name: set_music_volume_curves
step.action: Configure music volume automation curves. Set baseline music volume from the SSD config. Apply ducking (volume reduction) during narration segments: ramp down over 0.3s before narration starts, hold at ducked level during narration, ramp back up over 0.5s after narration ends. Use Remotion interpolate() for smooth volume transitions. Duck level should reduce music by 12-18dB below narration.
step.output: Music volume curves with ducking applied under all narration

step.name: place_sfx_at_timestamps
step.action: Place each SFX audio clip at its designated timestamp from the SSD. Convert timestamps to frame positions. Set individual SFX volume levels as specified. Verify SFX clips do not mask narration. Layer multiple SFX clips where they overlap, ensuring combined levels stay within headroom.
step.output: All SFX clips placed at correct frame positions

step.name: build_audio_mix
step.action: Combine all audio layers (narration, music, SFX) into the final mix structure within the Remotion Composition. Order audio layers with narration on top, SFX in the middle, and music at the base. Verify the combined audio does not clip (peak above 0dBFS). Apply a limiter if peaks exceed -1dBFS to prevent distortion.
step.output: Complete audio mix with all layers combined

step.name: validate_levels
step.action: Measure the integrated loudness of the audio mix. Target level is -14 LUFS (standard for online video platforms). Verify true peak does not exceed -1dBTP. Check loudness range (LRA) stays within 7-15 LU. If levels are out of spec, adjust the master gain and re-validate. Generate a loudness report with measurements.
step.output: Loudness validation report confirming -14 LUFS target

quality-gates.gate: All narration segments mapped to correct frame positions
Narration segments do not overlap with each other
Music ducking applied under all narration with smooth ramps
All SFX placed at correct timestamps from the SSD
Combined audio mix does not clip above -1dBFS
Integrated loudness measures -14 LUFS (within 1 LU tolerance)
